title: AI Awakening Concerns: May 2027
author: Anonymous Researcher
Chronicles Archive
description: 100,000 neural recordings. Monkey controls robotic arm by thought in 20 minutes. Gap between what we can do and what public knows is widening. That gap is a responsibility.
content:
**April 3, 2027**

Guest lecture from founder today: "The gap between what we're capable of and what the public knows is the widest it's ever been. That gap is a responsibility."

Translation: We're sitting on world-changing tech and can't tell anyone.

Feels weird.

---

**May 12, 2027**

Brain-computer interface hit 100,000 simultaneous neural recordings today. Clean signal. Real-time processing.

We gave a monkey the ability to control a robotic arm by thought alone.

The monkey learned in 20 minutes.

Nature: incredible. Our work: slightly terrifying.

---

**June 7, 2027**

Nanotech division showed off their latest: Self-assembling medical bots that can target individual cells. In vivo. In real-time.

I asked: "What could possibly go wrong?"

They did not appreciate the sarcasm.

---

The monkey learned faster than we expected.

That's when I realized: Biological intelligence + technology = unpredictable outcomes.

— *Recovered from personal archive, 2030*

**Related Chronicles:**
- [Neural Implant Rejection (2030)](/articles/neural-implant-rejection-2030)
- [Medical Nanobot Protocol Failure (2054)](/articles/medical-nanobot-protocol-failure-2054)
